positive: Stylized minimalist celestial garden scene, featuring overlapping outlines of deep indigo nebula clouds intersecting with ornate, symmetrical botanical silhouettes like ferns, crescent moons, and stylized lotus blossoms. The composition must be highly centralized and balanced, creating a strong negative space contrast against vibrant cosmic elements. Use thick, clean linework and a limited, rich color palette of deep navy, soft teal, gold leaf accents, and muted lavender. The art style should emulate elegant woodcut etching combined with modern graphic design, suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, perfect symmetry, clean vector aesthetic.
negative: blurry, photorealistic, gradient, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, complex background, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of focus, cropped, cartoon, doodle, graffiti
